messages.content:
Download Case Study B (Template).xlsx, complete the financial model, and answer questions 6-12.

What is the Revenue in 2025 when running the Base Case Drivers?

64.331 million
63.971 million
61.833 million
58.013 million
63.971 million

According to the Corporate Finance Institute (CFI). What is the Market Capitalization of the target company using the Median P / E multiple and the LTM Net Income (using Comparable Company Analysis)?

410.788 million
338.520 million
379.845 million
341.611 million
338.520 million

According to the Corporate Finance Institute (CFI). Which type of budgeting requests for investment in large assets such as buildings, renovations, software systems and furniture?


Operating budgets
Expense budgets
Cash budgets
Capital budgets
Capital budgets

According to the Corporate Finance Institute (CFI). Which of the following best describes the market value of equity?

Total assets minus total liabilities
Total assets minus total interest bearing debt
How much the entire company is worth
Number of shares outstanding x price per share
Number of shares outstanding x price per share

According to the Corporate Finance Institute (CFI). How will you solve the circular reference problem in Excel?

Options > Advanced > Check "Enable multi-threaded calculation"
Options > Advanced > Check "Extend data range formats and formulas"
Options > Formulas > Check "Enable iterative calculation"
Options > Formulas > Set Workbook Calculation to "Manual"
Options > Formulas > Check "Enable iterative calculation"

According to the Corporate Finance Institute (CFI). 
What could be the yield to maturity for a 3 year bond with a 8% annual coupon if the bond is trading at discount?

7%
8%
9%
All of the above is possible

According to the Corporate Finance Institute (CFI). 

Cells are ______ by default, so before protecting a worksheet you must ___________.

locked; unlock the input cells
locked; unlock the formula cells
unlocked; lock the formula cells
unlocked; lock the input cells
unlocked; lock the input cells.

According to the Corporate Finance Institute (CFI). A typical DCF forecast consists of which two parts and in what order?


discrete forecast; terminal value
calculate unlevered free cash flows; discount UFCF by WACC
terminal value; discrete forecast
perpetuity growth method; terminal multiple method
discrete forecast; terminal value

According to the Corporate Finance Institute (CFI). Which of the following is NOT true about horizontal or vertical analysis?


It is ideal to perform horizontal analysis over a period of at least five years to see the overall trend.
Vertical analysis evaluates financial statement by expressing each line item as a percentage of the base amount for that period.
Vertical analysis allows the comparison between financial ratios over a certain time period.
Horizontal analysis is usually performed after vertical analysis is complete.
Horizontal analysis is usually performed after vertical analysis is complete.
is  Vertical analysis allows the comparison between financial ratios over a certain time period. ?

No. Vertical analysis expresses each line item as a percentage of the base amount for that period, and allows the comparison between line items within the same period. It does not compare financial ratios over a certain time period.

According to the Corporate Finance Institute (CFI). In PowerPoint, which tab of the ribbon would you use to insert a fade on a textbox during the presentation?

Animations
Slide show
Insert
Transitions
Animations
